Story Title: Backend Advanced Capabilities and Reliability Hardening
Acceptance Criteria: 1) Consolidate backend capabilities currently implemented but not captured in Sprint 1/2 sheet; 2) Track AI reliability governance and advanced compliance/backend workflows under one story; 3) Ensure each subtask has measurable AC and traceable evidence

Story Title: Backend Advanced Capabilities and Reliability Hardening
Subtask Title: LLM orchestration fallback and cache reliability
Acceptance Criteria: 1) Chat/help/workflow endpoints support streaming responses; 2) Primary provider failure triggers configured fallback chain; 3) Typed provider failure responses are returned with diagnostic context; 4) Cache behavior is configurable and measurable (hit/miss); 5) Provider health checks are available without exposing secrets

Story Title: Backend Advanced Capabilities and Reliability Hardening
Subtask Title: Federated learning feedback jobs and gradient pipeline
Acceptance Criteria: 1) Device token can fetch unused training feedback; 2) Device can create/update training jobs with metrics and error fields; 3) Gradient submit is accepted only for active collecting rounds; 4) Round participant counters update and transition to aggregating at threshold; 5) Stats endpoint returns feedback/job/contribution totals per device

Story Title: Backend Advanced Capabilities and Reliability Hardening
Subtask Title: AI decision review queue and admin approval workflow
Acceptance Criteria: 1) Users can create decision review requests with typed categories; 2) Admin/global_admin can list approve and reject; 3) Non-admin access to global queue is blocked; 4) Status transitions are enforced (pending to approved/rejected); 5) All transitions are auditable

Story Title: Backend Advanced Capabilities and Reliability Hardening
Subtask Title: Secure device pairing lifecycle with post-pair handoff
Acceptance Criteria: 1) Authenticated user can start pairing session and receive pairing code/session; 2) Pairing TTL and expiration are enforced; 3) Confirm endpoint consumes pending session once and creates linked device; 4) Pairing confirmation returns handoff payload when available; 5) Pairing and confirmation events are logged for audit

Story Title: Backend Advanced Capabilities and Reliability Hardening
Subtask Title: Role-aware user creation request approval governance
Acceptance Criteria: 1) User creation requests persist with requester role and pending state; 2) Approval authority rules are enforced by role; 3) Approve action creates user and assigns role with reviewer metadata; 4) Reject action captures reason and reviewer metadata; 5) Request listing respects role-based visibility rules

Story Title: Backend Advanced Capabilities and Reliability Hardening
Subtask Title: Tamper-evident audit ledger with explainability fields
Acceptance Criteria: 1) Audit rows include deterministic integrity hashes; 2) DB trigger computes chain hash linking to previous row; 3) Verification function can detect hash mismatches; 4) AI event fields support model_id prediction shap_values reasoning; 5) Sensitive keys are scrubbed before persistence
